title: pVaults
description: Secure, multi-page personal vaults for Minecraft! Keep items safe across server resets, support for offline and Bedrock (Geyser) players, and full admin control with easy page management.
body:
**pVaults – Player Vaults Plugin**

Give your players secure personal storage with **pVaults**! This plugin allows players to have their own vaults with multiple pages, fully customizable via permissions. Admins can view, edit, and manage vaults, even for offline players. 

**Features:**

- **Personal Vaults:** Each player has their own vault with multiple pages.
- **Page Navigation:** Use GUI arrows to switch pages.
- **Admin Control:** `/vault view <player> <page>` lets admins inspect and modify any player's vault.
- **Configurable:** Customize page size, default max pages, and GUI title with MiniMessage support via `config.yml`.
- **Permissions Support:**
  - `playervaults.use` – Allows using your personal vault.
  - `playervaults.admin` – Allows viewing/editing other players’ vaults and reloading the plugin.
  - `playervaults.pages.X` – Grants access to additional vault pages beyond the default.

**Commands:**

- /vault [page] – Open your vault.
- /vault view <player> <page> – Admin command to view or edit a player’s vault.
- /playervaults reload – Reload the plugin configuration (admin only).

**How?**
You can transfer Vaults across servers, and retain them through server resets!

- Every vault is stored in the "vaults" folder in the PlayerVaults folder.
- To transport between server A to server B you can zip the vaults folder in server A and download it then import it to the PlayerVaults folder in server B
- And its pretty much the same for server resets! If you download the vaults folder and then upload it again once the server resets it will keep the data.
